description: Mercantile accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. Relatively large bifolio. Dating: 11th or early 12th century. The hand is that of ʿArūs b. Yosef. May belong with T-S NS 225.116. Mentions goods such as brazilwood, pepper, cardamom, and musk.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
